bug_title: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING on chunk_index causes re-embedding to silently delete all chunks

root_cause.sql: INSERT INTO doc_embeddings ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
sequence: 1. v1 content embedded: chunk (project_id, source, path, chunk_index=0) → v1 content_hash
2. v2 write: file_hash_matches? returns false (different hash) → proceed to do_embed_file
4. v2 chunk generated with v2_content_hash (different from v1)
5. insert v2 chunk: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING → INSERT IGNORED because chunk_index=0 already exists
6. delete_old_chunks: current_hashes = [v2_content_hash], but stored row has v1_content_hash → ROW DELETED
8. Result: spec embedding completely wiped, search returns 0 results

evidence.log_line_insert: Line 78576 in mix_phx_4004.log shows v2 embedding INSERT being called
evidence.log_line_delete: Line 78578 shows DELETE removing v1 content_hash (which is what's stored)
evidence.search_after_v2_sync: 0 results for any widget-related query with source:spec
evidence.db_check: SELECT on doc_embeddings for sandbox project with source=spec returns 0 rows

fix: Change ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING to ON CONFLICT (project_id, source, path, chunk_index) DO UPDATE SET content=EXCLUDED.content, content_hash=EXCLUDED.content_hash, file_hash=EXCLUDED.file_hash, embedding=EXCLUDED.embedding, updated_at=EXCLUDED.updated_at
